query:
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
                'id', id,
                'geometry', ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326))::jsonb,
                'properties',  properties || jsonb_build_object('name', name, 'is_primary', is_primary) 
            ) as "feature!: Json<FeatureRow>"
            FROM app.features
            WHERE id = $1
